zh.lifeSummary: 當John Appleton於1404年出生在英國素福爾可蕾托 文哈姆時，他的父親John Appleton24歲，母親Margaret Wellinger24歲。他於大約1434年與Margaret Welling在英國英格蘭素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1481年4月9日在英國素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年77歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可巴貝。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Appleton于1404年出生在英国素福爾可蕾托 文哈姆时，他的父亲John Appleton24岁，母亲Margaret Wellinger24岁。他于大约1434年与Margaret Welling在英国英格兰素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1481年4月9日在英国素福爾可蕾托 瓦爾迪費爾德享年77岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素福爾可巴貝。

nameMeanings.name: Appleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the many places in all parts of England named Appleton, from Old English æppeltūn ‘orchard’ (literally ‘apple enclosure’). Apples were particularly important in the Middle Ages as a food for survival through the winter.
History: This surname was brought to North America in 1635 by Samuel Appleton, who migrated from Ipswich, England, to Ipswich, MA.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Appleton was born in 1404, in Little Wenham, Suffolk, England, his father, John Appleton, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Wellinger, was 24. He married Margaret Welling about 1434, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 9 April 1481, in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Appleton est né en 1404, à Little Wenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, John Appleton, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Wellinger, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Welling environ 1434, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1481, à Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Babergh, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Appleton 1404 in Little Wenham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Appleton 24 und seine Mutter Margaret Wellinger 24. Er hat um 1434 in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Margaret Welling geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 9. April 1481 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, England und wurde in Babergh, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Margaret Welling circa 1434, nel Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. ja.lifeSummary: John Appletonが1404年にイギリススフォルクリットル ウエンハムで生まれた時，父John Appletonは24歳，母Margaret Wellingerは24歳であった。約1434年にイギリスイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドでMargaret Wellingと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1481年4月9日にイギリススフォルクリットル ワルディングフィールドで77歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススフォルクババーグにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Appleton(이)가 1404년 영국 수폴크 리틀 웬함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Appleton(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Wellinger(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1434년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 Margaret Welling(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1481년 4월 9일 영국 수폴크 리틀 월딩필드에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 베이버그h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Appleton nasceu em 1404, em Little Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Appleton, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Wellinger, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Welling aproximadamente 1434, em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1481, em Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Appleton родился в 1404 г. в местности литл венам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени John Appleton было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Wellinger, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Welling около 1434 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 апреля 1481 г. в местности литл валдингфиелд, суффолк, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности бабирг, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Margaret Welling aproximadamente 1434, en Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 9 de abril de 1481, en Little Waldingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Babergh, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
